TextENGNew: A bustling, noisy crowd of people poured out of the entrance. Pushing along with that flow, Toudou-kun and I finally made it outside.
"...Wah, my eyes~."
While shielding them with my hand, I looked up at the sky. It was a fairly sunny day. The deep blue sky was clear, and the summer sun was shining brightly on the ground. It was a little hot.
A cooling breeze blew through, mixed with the nasty smell of exhaust, but it didn't bother me at all today.
"It's a Sunday, so the movie theater was really crowded."
"It was a full theater, wasn't it?@k@vS04/36/310100896. But it was really good~."
I skipped lightly and turned toward Toudou-kun, flashing him a grin. He also gave me a kind smile and nodded.
"But I'm surprised.@k@vS04/39/310200146. I was worried sci-fi wasn't your thing, Kimiyoshi."
"That's not true.@k@vS04/36/310100898. I like all kinds of movies.@k@vS04/36/310100899. Romance, biographies, and nonfiction too.@k@vS04/36/310100900. But, I prefer..."
"Stories that have a happy ending,@k@vS04/39/310200148. ...right?"
Toudou-kun said that with a smile. ...I grew happy as I recalled when he confessed to me.
Right. Today was my first date with Toudou-kun. In the end, Toudou-kun and I decided we should use the tickets Chisato-chan gave us and see the movie together.
Thanks to that, I had to endure the ridicule and frequent teasing from everyone in class for the past week, until Sunday came along...
"But were you ok with all this, Toudou-kun?@k@vS04/36/310100902. I don't think I heard anything about whether you had plans or not originally..."
"Yeah, I generally do outdoor sketches on Sunday, so it's fine.@k@vS04/39/310200150. I like sketching beautiful scenery on days with fine weather like this."
"...Oh!@k@vS04/39/310200152. No, it's not like that!@k@vS04/39/310200153. What I wanted to say was, I didn't really have any plans for today, and besides..."
"Besides, what...?"
"I, well,@k@vS04/39/310200155. ... I always wanted to go out with you one day just like this."
When Toudou-kun said that, he looked away in embarrassment. I suppose he was trying to hide it, but his cheeks were red down to his neck, so there was no point.
Toudou-kun was as bad at conversation and unsophisticated as always. But I loved that side of him.
"What about you, Kimiyoshi? You didn't happen to have any plans for today, did you?"
"No.@k@vS04/36/310100906. Normally I'd be hanging out with my friends or working on the weekends, but now..."
"Oh, sorry.@k@vS04/36/310100908. I said something weird. Don't worry about it, ok?"
When I noticed Toudou-kun's expression starting to cloud over, I waved my hands in a panic.
...Maybe he heard from Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan, but it wasn't a big deal anymore. It's behind me now, and there's nothing I can do about it.
"...I'm no good at this.@k@vS04/36/310100910. We're finally on a date, but I can't read the mood at all."
"That's ok.@k@vS04/39/310200159. It's the same for me too."
"Sorry about that.@k@vS04/36/310100912. ...Thanks."
Then, the bell on the city concourse clock quietly rang out. It was 3 o'clock.
"Oh yeah, it's already mid-afternoon, huh.@k@vS04/39/310200161. Are you still feeling up for more after all this?"
"Huh?@k@vS04/36/310100914. Y-yeah.@k@vS04/36/310100915. As long as you're fine with it, Toudou-kun, a bit longer would be good."
It'd be pretty sad to say our goodbyes as soon as we finished watching the movie.
If possible... I'd like to talk at least a little bit longer with Toudou-kun. I didn't know what to talk about, but... I just wanted to stay with him.
"Well, how about we head to a coffee shop?@k@vS04/39/310200163. I'm feeling thirsty."
"Yeah.@k@vS04/36/310100917. ...By the way, Toudou-kun, you were focused on the movie during the entire screening, weren't you?"
"Eh... is that unusual?@k@vS04/39/310200165. I'm not too interested in eating or drinking during a movie."

"No, actually I'm the same way.@k@vS04/36/310100919. Chisato-chan says that popcorn is essential for movie watching, but I get distracted when I hear crunching sounds around me.@k@vS04/36/310100920. ...Oh, but don't tell Chisato-chan, ok?"

"Ahahaha, you've got it.@k@vS04/39/310200167. I myself went with her once... no, maybe it was twice?@k@vS04/39/310200168. There was one time where she made so much noise during the climax that I got annoyed and took the bag from her."
"Aahahhahhah!"
It was an amusing image, that's for sure.
Knowing Chisato-chan, I'm sure she said "what are you doing!" and probably tried to take it back from Toudou-kun.
Then they probably ignored the movie to start arguing with each other, someone around them would get upset and say "be quiet!" but the scene would already be over by then, and...
Huh...? What was this feeling? Though I'd brought it up and was laughing about it just a second ago... I wasn't having fun at all.
Instead, it made me feel uncomfortable... and angry. Mainly because Toudou-kun... has been to the movies with Chisato-chan.
I reflexively shook my head to shake off the emotions engulfing me.
...What am I thinking? Those two are childhood friends. They've spent more time with each other than with me.
Meaning there are times when they go out together as friends without regards for gender. Isn't it natural for them to have a story I don't know about?
Besides... Chisato-chan is my precious, best friend. She's supported Toudou-kun and me from the beginning, and she was the one who bought the tickets for today.
So I appreciate what she's done... There's no reason to feel jealousy or animosity.

But... thinking back on it now, Chisato-chan looked different from usual on the day that Toudou-kun confessed to me. She felt a little more mean-spirited than usual... like there were thorns in her words.
"......Kimiyoshi?"
"Huh?"
"What's wrong?@k@vS04/39/310200171. Your face looks a little pale."
"That's not true.@k@vS04/36/310100926. ...Oh, how about we check out that shop over there?@k@vS04/36/310100927. It has the best chocolate parfait. It's so colorful."
"Sure, ok.@k@vS04/39/310200173. I like that store's smoothies too. They're great, huh?"
Toudou-kun. ...Who did you drink that smoothie with...?
I walked a little ahead of Toudou-kun, trying to unravel these misunderstandings in my heart.
I didn't want him... to see my face right now.
As soon as we entered the shop, a young waitress greeted us and bowed politely.
"A table for two, then.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_WaitFa1002. Right this way, please."
She guided us to a nice table in front of the window and we sat down facing each other. Then, after wiping his hands with a table towel, Toudou-kun unfolded the menu at his seat and showed it to me.
"So Kimiyoshi, does a chocolate parfait sound good?"
"Yeah.@k@vS04/36/310100930. ...Oh, I thought something was different.@k@vS04/36/310100931. It looks like this is a new menu."

After saying that, I pointed to the entry for Melon Float Parfait on the other page. ...Chocolate parfait has been my favorite flavor for a long time, but I didn't want to eat one right now for some reason.
"Well then, I'll have a smoothie.@k@vS04/39/310200176. Excuuuse me."

Toudou-kun called out to a nearby waitress a few years older than us and gave our order. She quickly wrote down our order on a slip of paper, then bowed to us with a business smile and headed back to the kitchen.
"Do you think she's a college student?@k@vS04/36/310100933. That waitress, I mean."
"Huh? ...Oh, sorry.@k@vS04/39/310200178. I didn't get a good look."

Toudou-kun said that while shaking his head, then looked back to the kitchen. But she was already gone. He didn't seem that interested, as he immediately turned his attention to his cold beverage and drank half of it down.
"...Why did you think she was a college student?"
"Huh?@k@vS04/36/310100935. Oh, no reason in particular.@k@vS04/36/310100936. I just thought she looked about our age when I caught a glimpse of her, that's all."
...That said, it was all based on her appearance. I didn't have a very nice figure, and a smile didn't look good on me. Unlike me, she was a gorgeously beautiful woman.
"If I were a college student, I wonder if I'd have a part-time job too.@k@vS04/36/310100938. ...I'm not very pretty though, so I'd be no good as a waitress."
"That's not true.@k@vS04/39/310200181. Kimiyoshi, I'm sure you'd look great.@k@vS04/39/310200182. In a waitress uniform, I mean."
"...I'm not very good at interacting with customers though."
"I see.@k@vS04/39/310200184. ...Well, me too, I'm not good at talking to people."
Toudou-kun made a bitter smile after saying that.
Toudou-kun certainly struggled to behave properly in social situations. ...But I was sure his homely and sincere personality would be a hit with female customers.
And I only noticed this week, but... Toudou-kun seemed rather popular with the girls in the class. I'd heard quite a fair number of stories of people whose eye he'd caught.
So there were definitely several people who acted like they were jealous, but were actually glaring at me with hatred... hatred I wouldn't notice unless I paid close attention.

I drank a sip of water, the ice in my glass rolling around with a clink. My dream had come true, but even though I should be satisfied, happy, and enjoying myself... I couldn't understand why I couldn't bring myself to just kick back and revel in it all.

I'd never thought about things like this when I was yearning for him. On field trips or camping trips, we'd tell each other the names of our crushes, share our feelings, and tease one another about them.

That way, we were all at the same starting line no matter who we had our eyes set on. And even if our crushes were with someone else, we could cheer each other on and offer support from the bottom of our hearts.
But now that my feelings have been requited, can we all stay in the same mindset? ...That's probably impossible. Primarily because of the way I'm feeling right now.

Those plagued by unrequited love envy their crush's significant other and wish misfortune upon them. In turn, said significant other, rather than revelling in their success, becomes paranoid of losing what they have, and start eyeing everyone around them with fear and suspicion.
...It's not like that. The romance that I used to admire so much was not so different from studying in this city I couldn't bring myself to like.
With that in mind... I began to wonder if I was really feeling happiness right now. It felt empty...
"Thanks for waiting."
Eventually, the waitress from before came to our table carrying our orders on a tray.
A smoothie for Toudou-kun, and a parfait for me. ...I put a lot of thought into ordering it, and it was very colorful, but to be honest it didn't really feel like it matched my tastes.
"...I know her."
Toudou-kun checked the waitress's face as she left and spoke quietly.

"She's a graduate from our high school.@k@vS04/39/310200187. I think she was on the student council last year.@k@vS04/39/310200188. I heard she got into a college nearby, so it's just like you thought. She's a college student."
"...How do you know her?"
"She was helping with the budget and vendor arrangements during last year's cultural festival.@k@vS04/39/310200190. She's a really nice person."
"......Oh, so... that's it."
Though I felt relieved... at the same time, I felt self-loathing emanating from the depths of my heart.
Something is wrong with me. What am I thinking now...? I ought to know by now that Toudou-kun isn't that kind of person...
I carried a spoonful of parfait to my mouth to try to shake it out of my mind. ...And to no surprise, I didn't like it at all.
"...By the way, Kimiyoshi, have you made your career plans?"
"Huh?"
"Well, you see, I had my career meeting yesterday.@k@vS04/39/310200193. "Your art is good, but you should try a little harder in your other subjects" they told me."
"Ahahahaha.@k@vS04/36/310100946. But Toudou-kun, you got an art recommendation to go to Rikuo University, didn't you?"
"What...?@k@vS04/39/310200195. Did I ever talk to you about my school choices?"
I cursed and gasped when Toudou-kun stared at me with wide eyes. ...I might have hurt his feelings if I told him the teacher had mentioned it to me.
"Uh, umm,@k@vS04/36/310100948. ...Chisato-chan told me.@k@vS04/36/310100949. That you're going to Rikuo University."
"Chisato said that?@k@vS04/39/310200197. ...Yeesh, she can't keep a secret for the life of her.@k@vS04/39/310200198. I even told her not to tell anyone else because I hadn't decided yet."
......I knew it. Toudou-kun, did you notice?
Even though you kept it secret from me... why did you tell Chisato-chan?
My chest tightened. It was painful.
It became boiling hot, as if my heart was on fire.
It gradually grew more uncomfortable.
I felt jealousy bulging out of my heart.
Though I continued to maintain a smile... I struggled to suppress the dark feelings threatening to take my heart over.
Calm down, Natsumi. Cool your head and really think about it.
Chisato-chan has always been kind to me, hasn't she?
When I fainted and woke up in the hospital, she was worried about me, and she cried so much.
I'm wrong. I mustn't think badly of Chisato-chan.
She and Tamako-chan are my irreplaceable friends.
Those two must treasure me from the bottom of their hearts...
"...But why?@k@vS04/36/310100952. Why did Chisato-chan know you were going to Rikuo University...?"
"Huh?@k@vS04/39/310200200. Oh, she's going to Rikuo University too.@k@vS04/39/310200201. I think Tama is as well."
Right then.
Something snapped inside my heart.
That was... the first time... I'd heard any of this.
That Chisato-chan was going to Rikuo University... and that Tamako-chan was going with her.
Then...... what about me?
I...... can't go together with them...?
"Rikuo University?@k@vS04/37/310300661. That school's got a pretty high bar.@k@vS04/37/310300662. You'll have to study your butt off if you wanna get in there."
"Natsumi, your grades have been improving recently, but you should go with a safer option.@k@vS04/38/310400249. How about here?"

Back then... when I was prepping for my career meeting, both Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan told me Rikuo University would be too difficult, so I should stop pursuing it. I listened to their advice... I believed them, and didn't ask anything more.
But... by then, the two of them already decided... that they would go to Rikuo University, didn't they?
They knew I alone would be going to a different place... didn't they?
Then... why didn't they tell me? Weren't they supposed to be my best friends...?
No... it wasn't just that.
Chisato-chan knew... that Toudou-kun was aiming for Rikuo University, didn't she?
Why didn't she tell me?
Because she didn't know? Because she didn't know at the time that I liked Toudou-kun...?

"I did it, you know?!@k@vS04/37/310300664. Actually, Tamako and I had a bet amongst ourselves.@k@vS04/37/310300665. About if you'd fall for Akira!@k@vS04/37/310300666. And I won!@k@vS04/37/310300667. ...Or maybe it's actually a draw?"
"Huh?@k@vS04/36/310100955. Tamako-chan knew too?"
"Damn straight she did!@k@vS04/37/310300669. Since we first met! You thought we hadn't noticed?@k@vS04/37/310300670. Tamako and I have been waiting for you to tell us."
"Sorry... I couldn't say it..."
.........That was a lie.
She knew, didn't she? She knew ever since we first met... that I liked Toudou-kun!
So why didn't the two of them tell me?
Were they laughing at me behind my back?!
When I graduate from high school, I'll be going to a different school and I'll become separated from Toudou-kun. They both knew that, flattered me, cheered me up... all while secretly mocking me?!
......They wouldn't get away with this.
They wouldn't! They wouldn't! They wouldn't!
I thought they were my friends... I thought they were my dear friends!
Those conniving, sneaky, horrid traitors...!
"......Kimiyoshi?@k@vS04/39/310200203. Hey, Kimiyoshi?"
When I came back to my senses, I noticed.
Toudou-kun was squatting down beside me and looking over at me with a worried expression.
...My body was cold. I was trembling uncontrollably, and everything in front of me was sharply colored, changing shapes and looking distorted.
And yet... sweat was pouring out from my entire body. Several bead-like drops rose on my forehead, and multiple lines were rolling down my cheek nonstop.
Huh? What happened to me?
Why was I so cold? Why was I in so much pain?
"What's wrong, Kimiyoshi?!"
"N-nothing.@k@vS04/36/310100959. Just a little lost in thought..."
"A little? Don't try to act tough!@k@vS04/39/310200206. You're drenched in sweat, and your face is pale!@k@vS04/39/310200207. You need an ambulance, right away..."
"I-I'm all right!@k@vS04/36/310100961. Really!!"

The customers in the store began turning to look at source of the loud noises. I couldn't stand the uncomfortable feeling, so I stood up and begin to make my way out of the restaurant... At least, that was the plan, but my feet began to wobble and I crumbled to the ground.
"Kimiyoshi?!"
"I-it's no big deal...@k@vS04/36/310100963. I'm totally..."
After saying that, I started to rise to my feet again, but my legs refused to stand.
...Why? Why is this happening to me...!?
I felt miserable and embarrassed... Tears started flowing out, and I began to sob.
I didn't understand. I felt healthy this morning and I was in a great mood. Yet suddenly, my body was no longer listening to me, as if it wasn't mine anymore.
...Why is this happening? Why me? Why today?
Even though this is the most important day of my life...!
"......Kimiyoshi."
Right then, my body was lifted and softly placed on someone's back. ...When I opened my eyes, nearly blinded by my tears, I could see the side of Toudou-kun's neck.
"To-Toudou-k...?!"
"...Let's get going, Kimiyoshi.@k@vS04/39/310200211. I'll take you home."
"W-wait..."
I quickly tried to get off of Toudou-kun's back. However,
"We're heading out.@k@vS04/39/310200213. Let's go, Kimiyoshi."
After those powerful, gentle words, and from the comfort of his large back... I silently nodded to him.
I was on the way home, still riding Toudou-kun's back.
My house wasn't all that far from the station. ...But that was when taking only one person into account.
Toudou-kun's back was covered in sweat. Even though I was a girl, it still took a considerable amount of energy to walk with a person on your back.
Plus... I could feel unreserved looks from pedestrians along the way.

I tried telling him that this was embarrassing and that he could put me down already, but... I could tell that Toudou-kun was feeling even more embarrassed, so I guiltily continued clinging to his back.
"......I'm sorry."
"......It's all right."
I had already lost track of how many times I'd apologized to him. And every time, Toudou-kun answered in that gentle tone.
......I had so much to apologize for.
Sorry for ruining today's date.
Sorry for making you carry me this far.
Sorry for making you worry about me.
And...... Toudou-kun.
I'm sorry for keeping a secret from you... and constantly lying to you...!
Tears began to overflow. So many teardrops fell onto Toudou-kun's back and neck, but he didn't say anything. He just held me tight so that I wouldn't fall.
That made me both happy and sad... I couldn't stop myself from crying.
I didn't want to let go. I wanted to stay with gentle Toudou-kun forever.
But... if I...... said that one thing... to him.
Or... if someone else... told him.
I wouldn't be able to stay with him...
"......Toudou-kun..."
I firmly wrapped both my arms around Toudou-kun's shoulders, embracing his back.
I wanted to stay like this forever.
I wanted these happy times to continue forever and ever.
That was my only wish.
I kept my eyes closed during the rest of the journey home, basking in the warmth of the person I loved.
I parted ways with Toudou-kun in front of a corner, and returned home.
Toudou-kun said that he would carry me all the way home, but I was sure that Mom would be unhappy if she saw me like this and realized I'd been spending time with a boy from school.
...She might even reprimand Toudou-kun instead of thanking him. So I managed to persuade him to let me go.
I felt gloomy. ...It hasn't been much fun going home since that great disaster struck. We weren't hurt by it directly, but everyone in the family has been acting weird since that day.
And... maybe that includes me......
I believed that things would go back to normal someday. ...But there's no sign of that at the moment.
Mom had been stuck in the same mood regardless of who was around her, while Grandma had been constantly praying in the back room. And Dad just left the two of them alone.
Family breakdown... that was a term I'd heard on TV. However, perhaps it was most apt to describe our current situation.
When I opened the door to the house and slowly walked in... Mom was standing by the entrance.
"I-I'm home..."
Mom stood there expressionless with her arms folded, just looking down at me without saying a word. ...Her hair was a mess and her face was disheveled. Something was clearly off.
"W-what's wrong...?"
"......Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310600075. Come here for a minute."
"Huh? W-why do you,@k@vS04/36/310100979. ...Ouch?!"
Mom suddenly grabbed me by the arm and marched down the hall, dragging me with her. I quickly shook off my shoes. It was taking all I had just to keep up.
"W... wait, Mom!@k@vS04/36/310100981. T-this hurts!"
I struggled as hard as I could against Mom, but she paid me no heed. And when we entered the living room, she crudely thrust me forward like she was throwing me away.
"Kyaaa?!"
I hit my shoulder hard and looked up at Mom with tears in my eyes, shuddering. Mom's face was colored with a rage I'd never seen before... and she was glaring at me.
"...Natsumi.@k@vS04/00/310600077. You've been keeping a secret from us, haven't you...?"
"S-secret...?@k@vS04/36/310100984. W-what do you mean...?"
"Don't play dumb!"
I cowered, having been right in the line of fire of her air-shattering scream. My entire body trembled in fear, my throat parched like it was burning, and my mind was going blank.
"......I got a call from your teacher earlier.@k@vS04/00/310600080. You... were working a part-time job right behind our backs...?"
When I heard that... I froze.
That thing Ogata-sensei had called me to the staff room for when she heard the rumors......?!
I knew it... I knew she'd break her promise...! Even after she sincerely told me she wouldn't tell my parents!!
You told me you were worried about me! As if! All you're worried about is your professional reputation, isn't it?!
"...Is it true?@k@vS04/00/310600082. Natsumi..."
"Answer already!@k@vS04/00/310600084. Don't you think it's wrong to disgrace your parents?!"

"I don't want to hear any excuses!@k@vS04/00/310600086. I give you enough allowance as it is when we're already barely managing to make ends meet, don't I?!@k@vS04/00/310600087. And how do you repay me?! By sneaking around in the shadows!!"

"For shame...!@k@vS04/00/310600089. I am so ashamed of you...!@k@vS04/00/310600090. Not listening to your parents, frittering away your money, hanging out with bad influences, going out and about...!@k@vS04/00/310600091. This is all because your father and grandmother spoiled you while you were growing up...!"

"I have no daughter! Not one as ungrateful as you!@k@vS04/00/310600093. If you hate it so much, leave this house!@k@vS04/00/310600094. Come on!!@k@vS04/00/310600095. If you don't know how to count your blessings, you can leave, live however you want, and die for all I careee!!"
Right then... suddenly.
My racing emotions and shattering heart suddenly became colorless, transparent... The thoughts in my head cleared up.
I wasn't angry. I wasn't afraid. Sorrow, suffering, guilt, gratitude, despair... I felt none of them.
Everything intricately mixed together... the vectors in my mind coalesced on one thing.
Who asked me to be a part of this family?
When did you ask me to become a member of the Kimiyoshi family?
Do you seriously believe I would have wanted to be born a Hinamizawan?!
...Tap.
I've suffered excruciating hardship since I came to this city, thanks to being born and raised in the countryside.
...Tap, tap.
And thanks to that great disaster, I've had to keep secrets I didn't need to bear and make great efforts to maintain them to hide my connection to those freaks.
...Tap, tap, tap...
There's nothing for it. ...I was trying so hard, but Hinamizawa ruined everything...!
The Three Families? Oyashiro-sama? The curse? Like I care about any of that!
Hinamizawa hasn't given me anything. ...It gave me that horrible disaster, that's it!!
If only I wasn't from Hinamizawa! I'd be treating everyone normally, without having to bear all these inferiority complexes and obligations!!
I'd be playing with my friends like normal! Struggling to improve my grades like normal!! And finding a person to fall in love with, like normal!!!
It's all Hinamizawa's fault!! My happiness, efforts, and dreams have all gone up in smoke because I grew up in that wretched place!!
"......If that's the case...!!@k@vS04/36/310100995. If that's the case... I don't need this anymore!!@k@vS04/36/310100996. It should all go away!! Disappeeeeeeeeear!!"
Finally... I made it to my room.
How many hours had it been? Just how long did Mom and Dad scold me after Dad came home...?
In the end... they were both just mad I'd gotten a part-time job without their permission, and neither one bothered hearing my reasons.
They didn't care why... I guess they just wanted a distraction and to get mad about something.
And I... didn't feel like talking about it anymore. The way things stood now, I wasn't soft enough to consider spending my hard-earned money on my parents anymore.
What's more... I could hear Grandma's annoying shrill voice as she chanted her irritating prayers while my parents scolded me......
"......I know.@k@vS04/36/310100999. I'll use the money for Akira-kun's birthday gift.@k@vS04/36/310101000. And for summer vacation..."
Muttering that to myself... I closed my eyes and tried to sleep.
It'll be dinner time in a little while. I'm sure they'll come wake me up. Or maybe they won't bother to wake me and have dinner without me... but I'd be fine with that.
There were fun times. Happy times.
But beyond that... there were aggravating times.
That's why... I should forget everything and go to sleep.
Tomorrow... I can meet Akira-kun at school. And we can share fun stories about yesterday. If that can reduce these depressing feelings... that'll be enough.
It was getting close to dusk... Scarlet sunlight began pouring in through the windows, dyeing the room red.
From somewhere far away... I faintly heard the voice of the higurashi.
For me, they were a decent substitute for a lullaby.
Slowly... I slowly lost consciousness, leaving my body behind to enter a world of sleep...
